raw_consumer_statement:
I opened this card in XX/XX/year> for the sole purpose of purchasing one item, paying it off afterward, and leaving the card alone/closing the account after. The purchase was made on XX/XX/XXXX, for an amount of {$130.00} for a XXXX XXXX XXXX at BestBuy. Afterward, as no minimum payment was due yet, I did not check on the account until XX/XX/year>. 

By this point, unrecognized and unauthorized charges from a store I do not visit ( XXXX ) in a city 40 miles away from my home ( there is another location for the same store 9 miles away ). These purchases were made in the amounts of {$2500.00} and {$990.00} on XX/XX/year>. The next day, XX/XX/XXXX of 2024, an additional purchase was made for a " dolly '' purchase in the amount of {$110.00}. I was not contacted for these charges. I received no call, no voicemail, no notification through any communication channels. 

After I saw these fraudulent charges on XX/XX/year>, I opened a dispute on the CitiBank BestBuy website for all of these charges. I searched for the card and could not find it, so I requested the customer representative send a new card and cancel the last card. I received the card ( and have not activated it as I do not intend to use it ) and I received no further information through mail, email, text, or call until receiving the final decision on XX/XX/XXXX, through the mail. The decision made was to continue to charge my account with these fraudulent charges. 

I called the security department at CitiBank on XX/XX/XXXX, at XXXX PST, to reopen the case. I was given the claim # XXXX and the number XXXX to submit additional evidence/documents. I was informed that the dispute was denied as the chip was present during the transaction. However, I have my timesheet record as well as my location tracking which shows that only went to work and went home those two days. I submitted those documents, but was unable to reach the security department again to confirm their receiving of it.

I received no further information through mail, email, text, or call since then. Looking at the website for CitiBank BestBuy, there are no open cases.

I live in a 10 foot by 10 foot room, live and work 40 miles away from the location the charges occurred at, and have both my timesheet and my location tracking that shows I was not present for these charges. The card number provided on the next page of the form is the current number, but I have not activated it as I do not ever intend to use it.
